The '''Gupin stronghold''' was a fortress on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. A naturally formation, the fortress consisted of high walls ringed with torches. Occupied by the [[Gupin/Legends|Gupin]] race, the fortress served as a bastion from which the Gupin could defend themselves from other races, such as the hostile [[Grass Trekker/Legends|Grass Trekkers]].<ref name="LOTG" />
